message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf guards in VEF perf budget gate and object class tuning validation

- vef_perf_budget_gate: reject NaN/Inf noise_tolerance_cv_pct in validate()
  (NaN passed validation and caused all measurements to be skipped as
  "unstable", making the gate silently pass with zero real checks)
- vef_perf_budget_gate: fail-closed on NaN/Inf regression_threshold_pct
  (NaN threshold caused all `> NaN` comparisons to return false, hiding
  every regression)
- object_class_tuning: reject NaN/Inf encoding_overhead_ratio in validate()
  (NaN passed both `< 0.0` and `> 1.0` range checks due to IEEE 754)
- 7 regression tests added across both files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
